title: Why Trading Is IMPOSSIBLE (The Truth)
description: Most traders fail because they misunderstand this fundamental concept. The market isn't random - but your approach might be. Learn why trading feels impossible and how to fix it.
script: The more setups you take, the more money you lose. Here's why. Side A: Markets are random. You can't predict price movement. It's pure gambling. Side B: Markets follow smart money. Institutions create predictable patterns and liquidity zones. Verdict: Trading feels impossible when you chase every setup. Focus beats frequency.
